_metadata.notes: Proposed configuration for Q1 2025 rollout. NOT YET ACTIVE. Under review by architecture board. Do not deploy to production.

customer_agent.notes: Proposed increase from 60s to 120s — re-evaluate against SLA

analytics_agent.notes: Expanded payload cap for large report pulls

proposed_changes: Switch from pull-based polling to push-based event sync
Increase default interval to 600s to reduce PostgreSQL polling load
Introduce timestamp_wins as transitional conflict resolution before full CRDT rollout
Expand analytics_agent payload cap to support large dataset pulls
Disable polling in favor of webhook-based notification
